growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: mediadb.
growth_records.notes: growth_rate_per_h computed as ln(2)/doubling_time_h. Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

up.units: nmol P/L/day (=6 pmol P/L/day, bulk, late exponential max)
per day (cell-specific uptake constant, batch late-exp)

growth_records.cite: Grant et al. Elemental Composition, Phosphorous Uptake, and Characteristics of Growth of a SAR11 Strain in Batch and Continuous Culture. mSystems (2019). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.00218-18. [PMC6589437]
growth_records.snippet: In natural seawater-based growth medium, strain HIMB114 reached a maximum specific growth rate of 1.2 day-1 ... mean regression slope for exponential specific growth rate ... is 1.08 (SD, 0.03) day-1. Grown in standard medium at 26 C.
growth_records.notes: Batch. Reported max specific mu=1.2 day-1 (=1.2/24=0.050 h-1); mean exponential slope 1.08 day-1 (=1.08/24=0.045 h-1) used as growth_rate_per_h. doubling_time = ln2/mu = 0.6931/0.045 = 15.4 h. Bulk PO4 uptake max 6 pmol P/L/day = 0.006 nmol P/L/day; specific 4e-5 day-1. Respiration ~1 fmol O2/cell/day at mu~0.5 day-1; 0.37 umol O2/L/day (n=3). BGE 13+/-4%. No secreted organic products measured (CO2 implied by respiration but not quantified).

up.units: per day (specific uptake rate, mean +/-0.0025, n=5)

growth_records.cite: Grant et al. Elemental Composition, Phosphorous Uptake, and Characteristics of Growth of a SAR11 Strain in Batch and Continuous Culture. mSystems (2019). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.00218-18. [PMC6589437]
growth_records.snippet: in chemostats growing at 0.3 day-1, HIMB114 took up 1.1 +/- 0.3 amol P cell-1 day-1 ... cell-specific uptake rate is the product of the specific growth rate (mu) with the cellular P quota (QP): V = mu*QP ... yielded a theoretical uptake rat
growth_records.notes: Chemostat steady state: mu = D = 0.3 day-1 = 0.3/24 = 0.0125 h-1. doubling_time = ln2/mu = 0.6931/0.0125 = 55.4 h. Theoretical PO4 uptake V = mu*Qp = 0.3 day-1 * 14.2 amol/cell = 4.26 ~ 4.3 amol P/cell/day; measured highest 1.3 amol/cell/day ~30% of theoretical, i.e. <30% of cellular P from PO4. Specific PO4 uptake 0.007 day-1.
